pi_items.source: Task description and export/verifier scripts explicitly define and check this path.
Task description and export/verifier scripts explicitly define and check this path.
Task description explicitly requires outer rectangle width constrained to 600 mm, and verifier logic searches for lines matching this length (590-610mm).
Task description explicitly requires outer rectangle height constrained to 1800 mm.
Derived mathematically from 1800 mm height divided into 5 gaps by 4 interior shelves. Verifier logic explicitly enforces an average gap strictly between 358 and 362 mm.
Task description explicitly requires 4 horizontal line segments to represent the interior shelves. Verifier logic checks for 6 total parallel lines (4 shelves + 2 frame borders).

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated CAD data drawn by the agent from scratch. Task description and verifier logic explicitly require the parametric model to be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/bookcase.slvs' and exported as '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/bookcase.dxf'. The outer frame must be constrained to a width of 600 mm and a height of 1800 mm. The design requires exactly 4 interior shelves, which divides the 1800 mm height into 5 equal spaces, resulting in an expected perfectly equal gap of 360 mm between shelves, which is explicitly checked by the verifier's DXF parser logic.
